name: Waldorf Chicken Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the Underwood Chunky Chicken, softened cream cheese (3oz), finely chopped apple, raisins, and chopped celery.
2. Mix all ingredients well until combined.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. Serve the mixture on whole grain bread slices.
